narrative:
Precinct Huntsville (precinct in Logan County) has 280 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
